title: Urban Food Desert Mapping And Fresh-Food Access Gaps In LMIC Cities
summary: Build a verified workflow for mapping urban food deserts and fresh-food access gaps in LMIC cities, linking market-location data, food-price data, and population data.
why_it_matters: Build a verified workflow for mapping urban food deserts and fresh-food access gaps in LMIC cities, linking market-location data, food-price data, and population data.

success_metrics.target: Every claim links dated evidence with methodology.

review_policy.merge_gate: Schema validation, domain review, safety review, replication.
